items.title: The three reasons behind Penrith's record-breaking start to the 2026 NRL season
items.summary: Already, the 2026 premiership looks like it's Penrith's to lose, and there are three big reasons behind the Panthers' record-breaking start to the season.

items.title: Driver seriously injured, Princes Freeway shut for hours after truck collision at Officer
items.summary: The crash shutdown outbound lanes of the Princes Freeway at Officer in Melbourne's south-east.

items.title: Strathfield Council plan to rename Homebush slammed for chasing 'snob value'
items.summary: Some councillors think this area gets confused with Sydney's Olympic precinct and should be renamed. But the plan using the neighbouring suburb's name has rankled some in the community.

items.title: Kyogle train derailment happened on track with history of defects, report into NSW crash finds
items.summary: An investigation into the derailment of a freight train in northern NSW has found it happened on a section of track with a history of "geometry" defects.

items.title: SA farmers gamble on early winter crops after record rain, but expensive fuel and fertiliser a big concern
items.summary: Some SA farmers have rolled the dice on planting winter crops weeks earlier than usual thanks to record-breaking rains. Now they hope the gamble pays off.

items.summary: The Handmaid's Tale sequel, The Testaments, focuses on young women being groomed for marriage at an elite preparatory school headed by Aunt Lydia in Gilead.

items.title: Man shot by police during welfare check north of Brisbane charged with assaulting officers

items.title: Mistrial declared in case of alleged murder victim Geoffrey McLean, whose remains were found in wheelie bin
items.summary: A trial of four defendants charged in connection to the alleged murder of Geoffrey McLean — whose body was found dumped in a wheelie bin in Adelaide's north — has been vacated after a juror conducted independent research.

items.title: Federal government criticised for response into spread of sea urchins

items.title: Three-day hearing set for Grace Tame abuser Nicolaas Bester over alleged 'menacing' social media posts
items.summary: Nicolaas Bester, who was previously found guilty of sexually abusing Grace Tame, has been deemed unfit to stand trial over allegations he made "menacing" posts directed at her on social media.

items.summary: The South Australian premier is pushing for the state to be awarded a long-term contract for Gather Round, but says it could take weeks before a deal about the future of the footy festival is struck.

items.title: Ken Hinkley says he was shamed and exploited by AFL over controversial fine

items.title: Shayna Jack 'lighter' as she strives for Commonwealth Games selection

items.title: Trump's escalating rhetoric inappropriate for a United States president, Albanese says

items.summary: The US president announced a two-week ceasefire, as the clock counted down to his Iran deadline. The ASX has jumped on the news, while oil futures have plunged about 15pc. Follow the day's events and insights from our business reporters on the ABC News live markets blog.
